method: Para cada linha risk=high: pt-BR -> EN, comparar com source, confirmar SENTIDO, VOZ/humor (orgulho do Haku, sinceridade da Kuon), reveal de forca. Divergencia -> revisar.

entries.speaker: Kuon
entries.source: I'm not too keen on taking that away from you.
entries.target: Nao quero muito tirar isso de voce.
entries.note: BT: 'I don't really want to take that away from you.' Motivo sincero da Kuon (cuidar do orgulho do Haku sem humilhar) preservado; tom delicado, nao ironico.

entries.speaker: Kuon
entries.source: might be weighing on you, so I wanted to help.
entries.target: talvez estivesse te pesando, entao quis ajudar.
entries.note: BT: 'might be weighing on you, so I wanted to help.' Empatia da Kuon (percebe o desconforto dele de ser mantido) preservada sem sentimentalismo.

entries.speaker: Haku
entries.source: It's not like I feel emasculated or guilty or
entries.target: Nao e como se eu me sentisse menos homem ou culpado nem
entries.note: BT: 'It's not like I feel less of a man or guilty or' 'emasculated'->'menos homem' (BR natural). A negacao exagerada que DENUNCIA o oposto (ironia dramatica) preservada.

entries.speaker: Haku
entries.note: BT: 'KIDS carry these?' Incredulidade enfatica (caixa-alta) e o contraste absurdo preservados.

entries.speaker: Haku
entries.source: feeling she thinks she's hurt my masculinity.
entries.target: impressao de que ela acha que feriu minha masculinidade.
entries.note: BT: 'feeling she thinks she hurt my masculinity.' Eixo comico do orgulho do Haku preservado; ironia (ele se incomoda mas finge que nao).

entries.speaker: Haku
entries.source: I stand corrected. They are not light.
entries.note: BT: 'I stand corrected. They are not light.' Timing deadpan seco apos a bravata preservado 1:1.

entries.speaker: Haku
entries.source: shoulders, as though they were as light as beanbags.
entries.target: ombros, como se fossem leves feito almofadas.
entries.note: BT: 'shoulders, as if they were light as cushions.' Reveal de forca do povo-fera da Kuon: 'beanbags'->'almofadas' mantem a leveza absurda do contraste comico.

entries.speaker: Haku
entries.source: OK. Right. I'm just... I'm gonna act like I didn't
entries.target: Ta. Certo. Eu vou so... vou fingir que nao
entries.note: BT: 'OK. Right. I'm just... I'm gonna act like I didn't [see that]' Remate de auto-preservacao do ego (negacao da realidade) preservado; timing das reticencias mantido.
